page.content: In Table 1, the variables include Eyes, Mouth, Ears, Tail, T-6, and Tail-Wagging, with corresponding values for β and t. For Eyes (Ey-1), the β is 0.14 with a t value of 2.01; for Mouth (M-1), β is 0.48 with a t value of 7.15; for Ears (Ea-1), β is 0.19 with a t value of 2.58; for Tail (T-2), β is -0.16 with a t value of 2.1; for T-6, β is 0.18 with a t value of 2.44; for Tail-Wagging (TW-1), β is 0.34 with a t value of 3.79; and for TW-4, β is 0.33 with a t value of 4.79. In Table 2, the generations are categorized into Non-Steroidal and Steroidal treatments. The First Generation includes Aminogltethimide under Non-Steroidal and has no corresponding Steroidal treatment. The Second Generation includes Rogletimide under Non-Steroidal and Formestane under Steroidal, while Fadrozole appears in Non-Steroidal with no Steroidal counterpart. The Third Generation includes Anastrozole under Non-Steroidal and Exemestane under Steroidal, with Letrozole and Vorozole listed under Non-Steroidal, both lacking Steroidal treatments. This comprehensive overview encapsulates all values and categories across both tables.
